The Federal Trade Commission is sending a total of $1,500,000 in refunds to consumers who were enrolled in a subscription service without their consent.

You are eligible if you purchased a membership between January 2020 and June 2024 and were charged a recurring fee. You must file a claim by December 15, 2026.

Payments of $37.50 will be issued after the claims period ends. Proof of purchase may be requested.

File a claim
